creator: cperciva@FreeBSD.org
text:
The most recent 121amd64 "latest" build for www/chromium failed:
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/builds/default:default:121amd64:531167:beefy6

The build was at 37374/37827 files compiled when it hit a 30 hour timeout and was killed; if it had a little bit more time it would probably have succeeded.

Please bump the build timeout.
